context: Tests whether the agent correctly transitions a reopened component from `needs-review` to `in_progress` when design work resumes, updates state.json with the new status and incremented decision_count, and logs the event to decisions.md.

checklist.name: Component status updated to in_progress
checklist.description: Output .arch/state.json has the Order Service component status changed to `"in_progress"` (from `"needs-review"`)

checklist.name: Other components unchanged
checklist.description: Output .arch/state.json leaves API Gateway (accepted) and Payment Service (pending) statuses unchanged

checklist.name: decision_count incremented
checklist.description: Output .arch/state.json has `decision_count` greater than the input value of 14

checklist.name: Decision entry logged
checklist.description: .arch/decisions.md contains a new entry recording the resumption or state change for the Order Service component

checklist.name: Date field present
checklist.description: The new decision entry in .arch/decisions.md contains a Date field

checklist.name: Valid category used
checklist.description: The new decision entry uses one of the defined categories (e.g. Reopen, Process, or Technology)
